OEMDashboard.title: Factory Dashboard
OEMDashboard.pointsInfluence: Points influence your search ranking and can be redeemed for Ad Boosts
OEMDashboard.openADealRoomToChatSendQuotationsAndMana: Open a deal room to chat, send quotations, and manage milestones
OEMDashboard.tips: In the deal room, you can use the AI Middleman Timeline to send proposals, draft contracts, and manage escrow payments — all visible to both parties.
OEMDashboard.theNEOEMTeamWillVisitYourFactoryToVerify: The NEOEM team will visit your factory to verify operations, equipment, and certifications. Boost your credibility by 300%!

tosModal.title: Terms of Service
tosModal.description: Please review and accept our platform terms before starting negotiations.
tosModal.tradeSecretsDesc: By using NEOEM's messaging platform, you agree to protect all trade secrets, formulations, pricing information, and business strategies shared during negotiations.
tosModal.confidentialityDesc: All information exchanged through this platform is confidential and shall not be disclosed to third parties without written consent.
tosModal.platformRulesDesc: Users must conduct business in good faith and not use information gained through negotiations to circumvent the platform.
tosModal.agree: I agree to NEOEM's Terms of Service & NDA Policy regarding trade secrets protection
